  --ex            (Default: false) Check for unhandled exceptions

  --tc            (Default: false) Count threads

  --tp            (Default: false) Inspect thread pool

  --hg            (Default: false) Generations counts and sizes

  --st            (Default: false) Uniq stack traces and respective managed

  --bxst          (Default: false) Boxed structs counts and total sizes by types

                  heap generation
